name: Cornbread-Sausage Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg (from the original text, this seems to be a reference or placeholder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch pie plate and set aside.
2. Place sausage in a large skillet over medium heat. Break up the sausage with a fork. Cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
4. Drain the sausage, reserving the drippings. Return the sausage to the skillet.
5. Add celery, onion, and green pepper. Cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
6. In a medium bowl, combine egg and buttermilk. Beat until blended.
7. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt) and about 2 tablespoons of drippings to the bowl. Beat until everything is well combined.
8. Add half of the cornmeal mixture to the sausage; mix well.
9. Spread about half of the remaining cornmeal mixture into the pie plate, creating a border around the edge of the pie plate with a 1-inch width.
10. Spread the sausage mixture on top, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the center of the pie plate uncovered.
11. Spoon the remaining cornmeal around the edge, leaving a 4-inch circle in the center uncovered.
12. Bake for 30 minutes.
